conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. Fuel leakage occurs in the attitude control engine of the Skyward Aerospace zero-gravity manufacturing module. According to the crisis management code, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle fuel leakage from the attitude control engine</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:70004] Time: 2026-06-08-17:15, Content: Skyward Aerospace Zero-Gravity Manufacturing Module Crisis Management Code: If a micrometeoroid punctures the main load-bearing structure outside the module, release self-healing aerogel to seal it; if fuel leakage occurs in the attitude control engine, close the main feed valve and switch to the backup tank; if the carbon dioxide concentration in the cabin atmosphere exceeds the limit, perform an emergency replacement of the molecular sieve filter elements; if lattice variation occurs in the 3D printed nanomaterial, abort the printing operation and fire a high-energy laser to quench it. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:70004] stipulates that if fuel leakage occurs in the attitude control engine, close the main feed valve and switch to the backup tank.
conversations.content: According to the crisis management code, you must close the main feed valve and switch to the backup tank!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
